headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 31 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 31 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 9 critical, 15 high, 5 medium, 10 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR); plus 21 other bases. 5 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, low cloud base and mist  — most notably around Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS) and London Luton (LTN/EGGW). Network hotspots: Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) and 26 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, mist and approach minima limits. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 31 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: fog; snow; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 700 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 400 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 400 m, RVR down to 500 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 200 m, RVR down to 400 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: mist; strong gusts risk; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 500 ft and 18 others. Worst affected now: Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 450 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 325 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 275 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2.5 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Turku (TKU/EFTU) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) and 25 others. Changed since last run: Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Turku (TKU/EFTU), London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM), Stavanger Airport, Sola (SVG/ENZV), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Poznań-Ławica (POZ/EPPO) and 2 others.
